---
name: Feature Request
description: Suggest a new feature, Orchestrator version, or database contract.
title: '[Feature] '
labels: ['enhancement']
---

<!--
Thank you for helping improve Shine.
Every idea brings us closer to a fairer, more resilient music platform.
-->

## Scope

What area does this feature affect?

- [ ] Future Orchestrator (vNext)
- [ ] New Database Contract
- [ ] Existing Contract Enhancement
- [ ] Tooling / Developer Experience
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other: ___

## What problem are you solving?

Describe the gap or pain point. Keep it real and specific.

> Artists currently cannot... Users struggle to...

## What do you propose?

Explain the feature in plain language. If you have a technical sketch, share it.

> Add a new contract that... Modify Orchestrator to...

## Impact on artists and listeners

How does this help the people who use Shine?

> This lets artists... This makes it easier for listeners to...

## Gas considerations

If this touches core logic, how does it affect gas costs?

> Adds one SSTORE per transaction... Reduces calls by batching...

## Are you willing to work on this?

- [ ] I am willing to submit a PR for this feature
- [ ] I have reviewed the existing contracts and this does not duplicate current functionality

---

## AI Tool Disclosure (Required)

<!--
Transparency is mandatory. For every AI tool you used to create or refine this issue, state:
- Tool name (e.g., ChatGPT, Claude, Copilot, Cursor)
- Model version (e.g., GPT-4, Claude 3.5 Sonnet)
- Specific purpose (e.g., "Drafted the proposal text", "Analyzed gas costs of the suggested approach", "Generated the contract sketch", "Grammar checking only")

If you did not use any AI tools, write "None".

Any issue found to contain undisclosed AI-generated content will be closed and disregarded.
-->

**AI tools used:**

<!-- Example:
- ChatGPT-4o: Used to draft the initial proposal text and structure.
- Claude 3.5 Sonnet: Used to analyze potential gas implications of the new database design.

Or:
None
-->
